Date: The specific month and year when the observation was made.
Company: The name of the company related to the insight.

Product_Info_Language_Count: The number of languages in which the company displays product information.
Peak_Promotion_Items: The number of items that can be impacted by changes during peak promotions.
Operational_Challenges: Details of the unique operational challenges the company faces due to language diversity.

Operates in cities with diverse populations, requiring thousands of items to display pricing and product information in English plus at least one additional language. During peak promotions, changes can impact over 500 shelf labels per store, straining staff and increasing the risk of pricing inaccuracies or compliance issues.
